title: Sample Blog Post
description: This is a sample blog post template for reference.
body:
# Heading 1

This is a sample blog post to show the expected format for Markdown files in the `content/blog` directory.

## Heading 2

You can use standard Markdown features here:

- Bullet points
- **Bold text**
- *Italic text*
- [Links](https://example.com)

### Code snippet

```javascript
const message = "Hello, world!";
console.log(message);
```
